description: Street-front gelato and ice cream shops teenagers actually queue for. Every pin is on a main road or village street — park, walk to the window, no mall food courts.

eligibility_rules.notes: Ice cream runs are supervisor rewards after parking. Learner does not use the phone at the shop window.

advertising_model.summary: Ice cream is the easiest sell in Destination Drive — teens pick the flavour, parents pay, visit is already a planned reward after practice.

best_franchise_pitches.pitch: Two eastern-suburbs stores in one bundle; weekly specials drive repeat visits.
Coogee beach loop finale — pair with Coogee Pavilion or Chargrill.
150+ flavours; premium scoop shop on Campbell Parade strip.

suggested_offers: Upgrade to waffle cone on visit unlock

combo_badges.name: Bondi Scoop Crawl
combo_badges.description: Visit every Bondi ice cream stop in one play area.

combo_badges.name: Randwick Sweet Spot
combo_badges.description: Messina and Gaia on a Randwick village loop.

shops.name: Gelato Messina Bondi
shops.teen_appeal: Weekly specials, Fairy Bread lore, Instagram queues
shops.description: Hall Street shopfront off Campbell Parade — Sydney's most famous gelato queue.
shops.supervisor_notes: Park on Hall Street or nearby; expect foot traffic spilling from Campbell Parade.

shops.name: Gelato Messina Randwick
shops.teen_appeal: Second Messina in the play area — evening hangout near The Spot
shops.street_address: Shop G08, 162 Barker Street, Randwick NSW 2031
shops.description: Ground-floor Newmarket frontage on Barker Street — drive up Barker, park on street.
shops.supervisor_notes: Newmarket is open-air retail on Barker St, not an enclosed mall like Westfield.

shops.name: Anita Gelato Bondi
shops.teen_appeal: 150+ rotating flavours, Mama Anita recipes, zero-sugar options
shops.description: Campbell Parade shopfront — direct street frontage on the beach strip.
shops.supervisor_notes: Parallel park on Campbell Parade or side streets; very busy on summer evenings.
shops.suggested_offer: Free topping on any cup (partner placeholder)

shops.name: Luca & Luca
shops.teen_appeal: Harry's crew gelato — matcha, soft serve, limited drops
shops.description: North Bondi Campbell Parade corner — artisan gelato from the Harry's family.
shops.supervisor_notes: Quieter than central Bondi; good north-Bondi coastal drive loop stop.

shops.name: Ben & Jerry's Bondi Beach
shops.teen_appeal: Chunky flavours, milkshakes, familiar US brand
shops.street_address: Shop 3, 152 Campbell Parade, Bondi Beach NSW 2026
shops.description: Campbell Parade scoop shop — street-front, not a mall kiosk.
shops.supervisor_notes: Next to McDonald's Bondi; combine drive-thru + scoop shop in one lesson reward.
shops.suggested_offer: Free topping on a sundae (partner placeholder)

shops.name: Gelatissimo Coogee
shops.teen_appeal: Beach-side gelato, shakes, classic coastal treat
shops.description: Coogee Bay Road shopfront walking distance from the beach.
shops.supervisor_notes: Park on Coogee Bay Road or beach car parks; eat on the sand after.

shops.name: Gaia Gelato
shops.teen_appeal: Artisan small-batch gelato at The Spot — local teen favourite
shops.description: The Spot village street — Perouse Road shopfront near Randwick shops.
shops.supervisor_notes: Village streets around The Spot; pair with Messina Randwick on Barker Street.
shops.suggested_offer: Free topping on any cup (partner placeholder)

shops.name: Rivareno Gelato Bondi
shops.teen_appeal: Italian artisan gelato on Campbell Parade — daily fresh batches
shops.street_address: Retail 2/124 Campbell Parade, Bondi Beach NSW 2026
shops.description: Campbell Parade shopfront — completes the Bondi scoop strip.
shops.supervisor_notes: Central Campbell Parade; combine with Anita or Messina on a Bondi lesson finale.
